JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANG_XIAO.title: Jiang Xiao
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANG_XIAO.description: A Medical Star Warrior from [gold][Nine Star Burden][/gold]. He specializes in healing and tactical disruption, though he is secretly a master of various weapon arts.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANG_XIAO.goldMonologue: This little gold? Xia Yan gives me way more than this...
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANG_XIAO.eventDeathPreven: Dreams of the past, gathered at dawn; all but a passing dream.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANG_XIAO.cardsModifierDes: Jiang Xiao's cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
